# OpenClawSquad Rules

This workspace uses OpenClawSquad for multi-agent orchestration.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Interactive setup wizard
npx openclawsquad start

# Create a squad
npx openclawsquad create my-team

# Run it
npx openclawsquad run my-team
```

## Available Agents (27+)

- coordinator - Orchestration
- researcher, scraper - Intelligence
- writer, copywriter, designer - Content
- executor - Execution
- reviewer, codereviewer, tester - Quality
- pentester, securityauditor, bughunter, debugger - Security
- dataanalyst, visualizer - Data
- seoexpert, socialmediamanager - Marketing
- translator, summarizer, tutor - Communication
- And more...

## Squads

Define squads in the `squads/` directory.
